name: code-quality:critical
description: Code quality issue with significant risk (security, data integrity, prod stability)

name: code-quality:moderate
description: Code quality issue worth addressing but not urgent (tech debt, refactors)

name: code-quality:nice-to-have
description: Cosmetic or low-impact code quality improvement

name: agent-friendly
description: Scoped for autonomous agent execution — see the agent-friendly criteria doc

name: epic
description: Tracks a multi-issue body of work
